overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character crossing a wide urban intersection in a Los Santos-style city. The clip begins on a sidewalk next to colorful apartment buildings, then follows the character as they cross through moderate traffic including trucks and sports cars toward a modern glass tower.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
begins turning left toward the crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: standing on the sidewalk corner waiting for the traffic signal to change, then turning to face the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: standing at the corner near the traffic light, then walking away down the sidewalk

entered.detail: three-story yellow stucco residential building with multiple windows
tall modern curved building with horizontal glass bands and white structural elements
tall metal pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing button
pink multi-story apartment building visible behind the yellow building
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk near the apartment buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunny urban sidewalk corner with a yellow apartment building on the right and a modern curved glass tower visible down the street on the left. A pedestrian stands near the traffic light pole waiting. The traffic signal changes from red to green, and the camera begins to turn left toward the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection crosswalk with multiple traffic lanes

events.description: steps off the sidewalk curb and enters the marked crosswalk
black pickup truck passes through the intersection from left to right
large green recycling truck drives across the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide intersection through the marked crosswalk, navigating between lanes of traffic

notable_agents.action: large green and white recycling truck driving through the intersection
red sports car speeding through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: broad white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area
tall rectangular building with orange facade visible straight ahead across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the wide open intersection, leaving the sidewalk behind. White crosswalk lines mark the path across the asphalt as various vehicles including a recycling truck and red sports car pass through the intersection. The curved glass tower remains visible on the left while a tall orange building comes into view straight ahead.

events.description: tan vintage sedan drives past from left to right
black SUV passes through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk across the intersection toward the far sidewalk, with traffic clearing ahead

notable_agents.action: tan classic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: cluster of palm trees growing on the center median of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera continues across the intersection, now past the halfway point. A tan vintage car and black SUV pass by as the camera approaches the far curb. The curved glass tower looms larger on the left, and palm trees on the center median become visible as the crosswalk lines extend toward the approaching sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny urban sidewalk corner across a bustling city intersection toward a modern glass tower. It begins beside a yellow apartment building as a pedestrian waits for the traffic signal, which then turns green, prompting the camera to pivot left toward the crosswalk. As the camera moves into the wide open intersection, the sidewalk recedes and the view expands to include a recycling truck and a red sports car passing through the asphalt crossing. The scene then shifts further across the road, passing a tan vintage car and a black SUV while a tall orange building and center-median palm trees come into view. Finally, the camera approaches the far curb as the curved glass tower looms larger on the left, completing the crossing.
